title: hypericum tetrapterum var. genuinum
intro: Hypericum tetrapterum var. genuinum, also known as four-angled St. John's wort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Hypericaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum tetrapterum var. genuinum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to treat skin irritations and wounds.
